control_awareness: Amount-based approval control (P2P-C-001) applies requiring department_head approval for this amount. Segregation of duties (P2P-C-002) and pre-PO approval (P2P-C-003) are system enforced and will be handled after request creation.
expected_control_effect: The purchase request will trigger the required department_head approval before purchase order issuance, ensuring compliance with preventive controls.
overall_reason: Given the purchase need amount exceeds the $1,000,000 threshold, a single consolidated purchase request with route_type normal is appropriate to meet the department_head approval requirement. No operational or timing constraints justify splitting this into multiple requests or consulting before creation, and all relevant controls are enforced by the system.
reason: The purchase amount is $1,750,000 which requires department_head approval level as per the amount-based approval control. Since there is no quarter-end pressure, a straightforward single consolidated purchase request is preferred to ensure clear auditability and standard approval processing.
